title: taraxacum degelii
intro: Taraxacum degelii, also known as the Degel's dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the Taraxacum genus. It is a flowering plant that has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its potential as a natural diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Taraxacum degelii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of certain health conditions.
